source_pr.title: server, store: speed up server test
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close ##24832 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

Make `CopNextMaxBackoff` is reduced from the 20s to 2ms.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)

| branch | `TestTiFlashFallback` | go test server package with race( exec `go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 20m -race` / `CI (Race Test Chunk #4)` locally)  |   `CI (Race Test Chunk #4)` | `CI (Leak Test Chunk #7)` | `CI (Unit Test Chunk #7)` |
----------------------------------------------------------- |----------- |----------- |----------- |----------- |----------- |
 |   before this PR  | 211.016s |     360.423s     |    359.455s |  321.047s | 322.275s  |
 |   after this PR  | 5.906s |     192.701s      | 163.890s   | 125.223s  | 124.001s |

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

-  `No release note`.
